Video.summary: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Roy Harris as we delve into the life of a coach.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - Roy Harris
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - Roy Harris

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Coach - Roy Harris
